name: Coral Reef UV Sunglasses
description: Wayfarer-style polarized sunglasses with UV400 protection. Lightweight TR90 frame, scratch-resistant lenses and a sun-kissed coral finish that pairs perfectly with beach days and rooftop evenings.

name: Palm Breeze Linen Shirt
description: Breathable 100% Belgian linen shirt with a hand-painted palm print. Relaxed fit, coconut buttons and a half-camp collar - your new vacation uniform.

name: Sunset Glow SPF50 Serum
description: Featherweight mineral SPF50 serum with niacinamide and squalane. No white cast, reef-safe, and a luminous finish that doubles as a primer.

name: Driftwood Straw Beach Hat
description: Wide-brim handwoven raffia hat with a navy grosgrain band. Packable, UPF-rated, and timeless - straight out of an Amalfi postcard.

name: Aqua Trek Sport Sandals
description: Quick-drying webbing sandals with a contoured EVA footbed and grippy rubber outsole - built for tide pools, hot pavement and everything between.

name: Citrus Splash Insulated Bottle
description: Double-walled stainless steel bottle that keeps drinks cold for 24 hours. Citrus-yellow powder coat, bamboo lid and leakproof seal.

name: Mango Wave Beach Towel
description: Sand-resistant microfiber beach towel printed with a vintage mango-wave motif. Folds to the size of a paperback - perfect for the carry-on.

name: Coconut Cove Body Mist
description: A breezy body mist of coconut water, white tea and salted caramel. Alcohol-free, hydrating and addictive in the best way.

name: Tide Rider Board Shorts
description: Stretch recycled-polyester board shorts with a built-in mesh liner, zip pocket and quick-dry fabric. From morning surf to beachside tacos without a change.

name: Aloe Glacier After-Sun Gel
description: Cooling after-sun gel with 97% organic aloe vera, cucumber extract and vitamin E. Soothes sunburn, restores moisture and calms redness on contact.

name: Golden Hour Clip-On Lenses
description: Amber-tinted polarized clip-on lenses that fit most prescription frames. Flip-up hinge, anti-glare coating and a warm golden tone that makes every sunset glow.

name: Bali Rattan Beach Bag
description: Hand-woven rattan crossbody bag with a cotton lining and magnetic snap. Fits your phone, sunscreen and a good book — all the beach-day essentials.
